scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @pipelineflow-engagement/shared run build && pnpm -r --parallel run dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pipelineflow-engagement/shared run build && pnpm --filter @pipelineflow-engagement/api run build && pnpm --filter @pipelineflow-engagement/worker run build && pnpm --filter @pipelineflow-engagement/web run build
